title: Project Eevolve
description: A faithful Eevee expansion for Cobblemon
body:
Project Eevolve is a faithful expansion of Eevee and its evolutions, offering a full set of 18 evolutions based around the idea of a Regional Variant Eevee. Each of Eevee’s original evolutions is given a counterpart to the new regional eevee, and 2 unique evolutions have been added to offer a normal and fighting type evolution to the lineup. In total 10 new evolutions are included, with one being given to kantonian eevee and nine regional variants based on each of their kantonian counterparts.

Built by and for original Eevee lovers, this pack aims to give alternative typing choices without straying too far from what already exists. A wiki is currently under development and planned to be released some time after the official launch of Update v1.2.0

Until the wiki is released, all stats and available moves of the regional Eeveelutions [can be found here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15uiwOhebVaRYsp8Vb-PoW182uyPwp1VuSWdWGsnceIo/edit?usp=sharing).

Any questions or bug reports can be sent to me via one of the following:

- [Cobblemon Discord server Bug Reports & Discussion thread](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1099724075728896122)
- [Project Eevolve's community Discord server](<https://discord.gg/yantjgYa42>)

Many thanks for the community feedback in this project
and Special Thanks to:

- The dev team for continued development of Cobblemon
- User @lunalume from Myth Studios for the concept of Sereneon (Eevee’s normal evolution)
- Players who download and keep up with development of this addon
